content.html:
• Buds are appearing on trees, spring is nearly here!
  • Recently I’ve been thinking and talking a lot about the Double Diamond as a way of making every step, artefact and outcome of decision-making processes better.
  • Some days my lunch at work is absolutely shocking and since I have been rumbled, I shall share it here: Salad-chicken, random salad deli pot, multivitamin jelly and vitamin C drink.
  • Somehow 酒部 ended up with us at VENT.
  • Long weekend was spent doing paperwork and - spring cleaning.
  • Wings stripped away, the end is nigh.
